description: Configuration for the Feature Orchestrator plugin. Run /feature-orchestrator-plugin:setup to generate this file interactively.

repositories.description: Repository mapping. Keys are short names, values describe the hosting details.

accountType.description: Account label for gh CLI switching (maps to a username in developer-local.json). Optional if only one GitHub account.

modules.description: Module-to-repo mapping. Keys are module names referenced in work items. Each module maps to a repository.

repo.description: Key from the repositories map that this module belongs to

path.description: Path within the repo (e.g., 'common/' or 'src/api/'). Optional — omit if module is the whole repo.

purpose.description: Brief description of what this module does (used by codebase-researcher)

github.description: GitHub configuration. Usernames are stored in developer-local.json (gitignored), NOT here.

configFile.description: Path to per-developer config file (gitignored) that maps repos to GitHub usernames

iterationDepth.description: Depth for iteration discovery (6 for monthly sprints)

docsPath.description: Path to design docs folder (e.g., 'design-docs/' or 'docs/designs/')

folderPattern.description: Folder naming pattern for new designs

reviewRepo.description: ADO/GitHub repo for design review PRs (optional)
